title: AI Stock Marvell And Eli Lilly Lead 5 Names Near Buy Points As S&P 500 Rallies On

title: 7 Semiconductor Stocks to Buy Before the Breakout
text: Semiconductor stocks recently received news that bodes poorly for the sector overall: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE: TSM ) is now predicting a 10% sales slowdown in 2023. That figure was pegged at 5% only months ago.

title: Marvell Technology, Inc. Announces Conference Call to Review Second Quarter of Fiscal Year 2024 Financial Results
text: SANTA CLARA, Calif. , July 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL), a leader in infrastructure semiconductor solutions, today announced it will conduct a conference call following the release of its second quarter of fiscal year 2024 financial results on Thursday, August 24, 2023, at 1:45 p.m.

title: 3 Millionaire-Maker AI Chip Stocks to Buy Before the Window Closes
text: At the heart of the brave new world of artificial intelligence ( AI ) lies the top AI chip stocks, key players in the electrifying race toward AI's full potential. These powerful chip-makers, known for their superior data processing capabilities, are powering AI's quantum leaps forward at blistering speeds.

title: AI Stocks Lead These 5 Names Near Buy Points
text: Artificial intelligence stocks including chipmaker Marvell Technology, Arista Networks and Synopsys, which has launched AI-based chip-design tools, lead this weekend's watch list of five stocks near buy points.

title: 5 Surprising ‘Strong Buy' Tech Stocks That Also Could End Up Huge AI Winners
text: The massive market rally so far in 2023 has been driven largely by mega-cap technology companies that look like they will be the biggest winners in the artificial intelligence (AI) revolution.

title: 3 AI Stocks to Buy to Turn $5,000 Into $1 Million

title: Marvell (MRVL) Upgraded to Buy: What Does It Mean for the Stock?
text: Marvell (MRVL) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

title: Why Marvell Technology Rocketed 61.4% Higher in the First Half of 2023
text: Marvell has benefited from AI optimism since late May. Management has assembled a portfolio of products for data center networking and custom chip design.

title: Stock Market Holds Strong Ahead Of More Inflation Data; AI Stocks To Watch Include Adobe, Marvell
text: Buyers dictated the action again in the stock market Monday ahead of inflation data and a round of earnings reports in the financial sector.

title: Marvell Technology And The AI Hype Cycle
text: AI hype cycles regularly occur since the 1950s, often overestimating AI's potential. Yet they still push this multi-generational project forward. The latest hype cycle, fueled by generative AI, has led to increased investment and demand for Nvidia's GPUs, leaving scraps for other hardware manufacturers. Marvell has good data center hardware, but it is not the best. AI server builders generally choose the best. They are poorly armed, fighting over scraps.

title: Chip stocks lag market as semiconductor sales decline for 11th straight month
text: Chip stocks underperformed the broader market Thursday after the semiconductor industry logged its 11th month in a row of steep losses from the year-ago period.

title: Marvell Technology: Huge Potential Margin Expansion Opportunity
text: Marvell Technology has experienced poor margins due to high R&D expenses and increasing D&A and SG&A expenses, largely due to its acquisition strategy. However, MRVL expects to see improved net margins in the future as it aims to reduce operating costs. The company's revenue is projected to grow at an average annual rate of 18.5% over the next five years, with a forecasted net margin of 8.58%. Its valuation, based on a DCF valuation approach, yields a price target of $78.88, indicating a 35% upside. A potential risk for Marvell is the US-China trade war, as China is the largest source of revenue for the company. The restrictions on semiconductor exports to China could dampen demand for Marvell's products.

title: Marvell Stock: How Custom Data Center Chips Figure In AI Opportunity
text: Marvell stock has found technical support as analysts debate upside from custom AI chips used in data centers versus other business trends.

title: Artificial Intelligence Plays Lead 5 Stocks Near Buy Points
text: Visa stock, Marriott International broke out on Friday as shares rise on travel demand. Meanwhile, AI plays, Chipotle set up near buy points.
